obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_695_0: \E4* We witnessed the dance of people coming through the shop./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_696_0: \E4* A parade of smiling faces^1, of bright laughter./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_697_0: \E4* Beings driven by meaning..^1. by emotion..^1. by love./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_698_0: \E4* To be monster..^1. to be human^1. We wanted to know.../
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_719_0: \E4* It's time to say goodbye now./%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_741_0: \EV* ..^1. I'm not really good at goodbyes./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_742_0: \ES* Why can't everyone just come to our Castle Town?/
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_743_0: \EV* ..^1. I know^1. I know why^1. But.../%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_763_0: \EV* Kris^1, you should finish saying bye./%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_786_0: \Ea* You should say goodbye to everyone./%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_829_0: \E8* Heh^1, I..^1. didn't really know what to say./%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_897_0: \E4* The darkness let us fantasize a higher form of consciousness./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_899_0: \E4* It's time this capricious reverie came to an end./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_900_0: \E4* Kris..^1. the Fountain..^1. is waiting for you./%
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_976_0: \E4* This dream was always set to end./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_978_0: \E4* We knew that flowers^1, left in darkness^1, will perish./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_979_0: \E4* But^1, if we could give Asgore a glimpse of a perfect world.../
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_980_0: \E4* ..^1. it would make up for everything he had done for us./
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_981_0: \E4* After all^1, we weren't supposed to live more than a single day.../%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_16_0: \E4* ..^1. what are you waiting around for?/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_17_0: \E4* We said goodbye..^1. that means goodbye./%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_53_0: \E7* The flowers back home..^1. they were my wedding bouquet./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_54_0: \E2* I kept taking care of them all this time^1, but.../
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_55_0: \E0* From now on^1, I'm going to do it for my own sake./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_56_0: \E3* ..^1. did you want to say something?/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_60_0: \E3* ..^1. did you want to say something?/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_80_0: \E0* Kris..^1. don't worry^1. After we get back.../
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_81_0: \E2* We can tell the mayor about everything we saw./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_82_0: \E3* I know she'll do everything she can to help./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0: \E7* The more people are safe from this^1, the better.../%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0: \Em* Kris^1, I'm sorry^1. I can't say that enough./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0: \E0* ..^1. but..^1. you've grown up a lot^1, haven't you?/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0: \E3* When your brother finally comes home.../
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0: \EG* I can't wait to see how proud he'll be of you./%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_102_0: \E3* ..^1. that Asriel was going to end up your only friend./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_103_0: \E0* But it seems that you've met someone rather wonderful./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0: \E3* Not only has she fought by your side through danger.../
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0: \E6* ..^1. but^1, she also seems to have an interest in flowers!/%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_109_0: \E6* Feel free to bring her by anytime^1, Kris./
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_110_0: \E4* I'll give her a free snapdragon./%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_122_0: \E3* (It's strange^1. At a glance^1, they look a bit like Asriel...)/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0: \E7* (The harder it is to tell if they're a monster at all.)/%
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_128_0: \E2* (Even if they look that way^1, Kris accepts them...)/
obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0: \E3* (I hope they realize they don't have to hide themself.)/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_154_0: \E3* Harvesting more of your old "personal notes,^1" huh?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0: \El* Yes^1. Finally^1, the fruits of my research will come to bear.../
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_166_0: \EU* And then^1, I'll only need ONE last piece of proof./
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_168_0: \EV* ..^1. the creator of the Dark Fountain./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0: \EU* I'll find them here..^1. I know it./
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_214_0: \EW* Give them back all the pain they've inflicted./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_234_0: \EW* When I parade their body around town/
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0: \Eb* Everyone will finally realize how right I was./
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_236_0: \EU* That I wasn't "crazy." That they weren't^1, "conspiracies."/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_252_0: \EO* That all..^1. I ever wanted to do..^1. was help./
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_265_0: \EO* Tori..^1. she'll have to forgive me^1. And finally.../%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_273_0: \Eb* Everything..^1. will go back to normal./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_284_0: \E2\VT* Ha Ha^1! Yeah^1, Man^1! That's classic Gorey for ya!/
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_287_0: \E3\VK* But^1, if I can leaf my opinion.../%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_298_0: \E0\V7* You don't really need Tori anymore./
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_301_0: \E3\Va* I mean^1, she doesn't have two diners!/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_323_0: \EY* Oh^1, yes^1! Haha^1. Whatever am I thinking and saying?/
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_332_0: \EY* A golden breastplate with her face on it^1, either!/
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_334_0: \E2\VT* Haha^1! That's my main man^1! Let's go./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_367_0: \Eh* What's with those papers your dad's gathering...?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_423_0: \E0\Vb* Haha^1, walking now^1. Dinerstyle with the boys..^1. we go./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_433_0: \Eh* Hey^1, Kris^1? No offense^1, but your dad's..^1. NUTS./%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_455_0: \E5* What were YOU like^1? What were YOU willing to do...?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL00_slash_Step_0_gml_507_0: \EE* Susie^1, you're good^1. Even if his words are correct^1,/
